---
title: "ChessOlympiad"
description: "Three datasets to analyze the performance of 937 players from 188 countries during the 2022 Chess Olympiad in Chennai, India."
image: ../../img/packages/chessolympiad.png
order: 4
categories: [data, chess]
href: https://github.com/focardozom/ChessOlympiad22
---
